content_en:
‘8 Sahih Bukhari (Arabic/English) Vol. 6, p. 514, No. 568.

“6 Sahih Bukhari (Arabic/English) Vol. 9, p. 477, No. 634.

He who recites while he is praying behind the Imam will have his mouth filled with fire on the Day of Judgement.

Related by Ibn Taahir in his book At-Tadhkira. He also classified it fabricated and said a Dajjal (liar) was found in the chain of transmitters.

The above-mentioned fabricated hadith gives the impression that it is haraam for a person to recite Surah Fatiha while praying behind the Imam. This issue is a matter of contention between the scholars past and present. They differ about the permissibility of reciting Surah Fatiha behind the Imam with three opinions.

1. It is wajib to recite Surah Fatiha in all the prayers when praying behind the Imam i.e. both in the silent prayer and the loud prayer.

2. It is wajib to keep quiet in all the prayers both in the silent prayers and the loud prayers.

3. When praying behind the Imam one should recite Surah Fatiha in the quiet prayers but not in the loud prayers since we all have to listen attentively to. the Imam’s recitation.

This last opinion is the most accurate and it is the school of thought of Imam Malik and Ahmad Ibn Hanbal.

The following Hadith Qudsi states that we should recite Surah Fatiha behind the Imam to ourselves in the silent prayers. Narrated Abu Huraira (ra) may Allah be pleased with him from the Prophet 3 who said: “A prayer performed by someone who has not recited the essence of the Quran (i.e. Fatiha) is deficient and he repeated the word three times, incomplete. Someone said to Abu Huraira: Even though we are

behind the Imam? He said recite it inwardly to yourself.”!*

This Hadith Qudsi is evidence for reciting Surah Fatiha behind the Imam to ourselves in the silent prayers. As for the evidence for keeping quiet and listening attentively to the Imam in the loud prayers; is the ayah where Allah 3% said:

“And whenever the Qur’an is being recited listen attentively and keep quiet in order that you may obtain Allah’s mercy. ule

It is haraam to have a conversation when the Qur’an is being recited. The same ruling goes for the athaanand the iqaamah.

Whenever one performs a lot of Hajj and Umrah he or she is protected from poverty.

Related by al-Haamilee and classified fabricated by Ibn Hibbaan.

This hadith if acted upon can make life difficult for the Muslims. Every year there is a problem of overcrowding during the Hajj season. The Muslims who have already made Hajj should stay at home and give the opportunity to someone else who has not been for Hajj. The most pious Muslim to ever walk earth was the Holy Prophet 2 and he only made Hajj once in

148 Sahih Muslim (English trans.) Vol. 1, P. 215 No. 775 " Surah A'raaf 7:204.

He who prayed two rak’ah of prayer in privacy without being seen by anyone except Allah and the Angels will be saved from the Hell-fire.

Related by Ibn Asaakir and classified fabricated by adhDhahaabee.

HADI TH 85 The heart of a believer is Allah’s dwelling place.

Classified fabricated by Az-Zarkashee and Ibn Taymiyya.

This fabricated hadith has another wording, which goes as follows:

Neither My earth nor My heavens are vast enough to contain Me but the heart of My believing servant does contain Me.

Sheikul Islam Ibn Taymiyya said this saying can be found among the Israaeelias and it’s definitely not a saying of the Holy Prophet

This fabricated hadith is famous among Sufi circles. They are attracted to this fabricated hadith because they use it to promote their erroneous concept of incarnation. Incarnation is kufr, because Allah 3% does not dwell inside of His creation and He has never appeared on earth in the form of an Angel or

any human being. Anyone who believes that Allah 5 appeared on earth in the form of a human being is a Kafir. This is the ageedah of Christians and Louis Farrakhan. Some Christians claim that Jesus **=3\ was God in flesh. The Nation of Islam claim that Allah 3 appeared in the person of Master Fard Muhammad. Anyone who dies with this belief that Allah 3% appeared on earth in the form of a human being will be in the Hell-fire to abide forever

In refuting this concept Allah 5% said:

Also we say to the Christians if Jesus *53) was God in flesh why did he rebuke the man who said tc him: “O good master,” by saying, “Why call me good, no one is good except God.”!*! HADITH 86

Madinah is holier than Makkah.

Related by Tabaraani and classified fabricated by adhDhahaabee.

There is a difference of opinion among the scholars as to whether Makkah is holier than Madinah. It’s our madhab (i.e. Hanbali school of thought) that Makkah is holier than Madinah. This view is also championed by Imam Abu Hanifa and Shafi. However Imam Malik and most of his students are of the view that Madinah is holier than Makkah. The great Maliki scholar al Qaadi Iyaad said Madinah is the most sacred place on earth because the grave of the Holy Prophet “3% is there.

Salah performed at Masjid Al Haraam in Makkah is equivalent to one hundred thousand salah while salah performed at the Prophet’s 3 mosque in Madinah is equivalent to a thousand salah, so how can Madinah be better than Makkah?!

On the authority of Abdullah Ibn Adee Ibn Hamraa AzZuhri who said: “J saw the Messenger of Allah 3%, while he was on the back of his camel in Makkah on his way to Madinah for Hijrah, saying: By Allah you are the most sacred land of Allah and you are the most favourite place with Allah. Had it not been that my people drive me out from you I would never leave you. ”!*

Additionally Allah 3 has made mention of Makkah in the Holy Qur’an with the title The Mother of All Cities. So if Allah 3% gave Makkah this title how can one entertain the idea

‘82 Sahih Muslim (English trans.) Vol.2 p.697 No.3209 '3 See Sharh Muslim by Imam Nawawi Vol. 9, p. 164. *S4 Sunan Tirmidhi No. 3925.

that there is a city, which is holier than Makkah. In this regards Allah 3 said:

Werteri-tees enter here le fenertes pre @ irshilas pearls le aby

“And this (The Qur’an) is a blessed book which We have sent down, confirming the revelations which came before it, so that you may warn the mother of all cities (i.e. Makkah) and all those around it. Those who believe in the Hereafter believe in it (The Qur ’an) and they are constant in guarding their prayers.”

Verily Allah does not accept a supplication (Du’aaa), which has a grammatical error in it.

Related by Taqi Subkee and classified fabricated by Mula Ali Qaari.

A grammatical error is not a reason to have one’s Du’aa rejected. The du’aa that Allah 3% rejects is the Du’aa of a person who eats haraam food, or consumes haraam drink. Such a person will have his du’aa rejected for forty days. Drug abuse also causes one’s du’aa and salah to be rejected for forty days.

The Holy Prophet 38 said: “dua is worship (Ibaada).””**

Since du’aa is ibaada no one is allowed to make du’aa to others other than Allah 3%. In this regards Allah 3% said:

Seeballn5 4D slasy clakay Sty le LS

“Say verily my Salah and my sacrifice, my living and my dying are for Allah the Lord of the worlds.”"””

Since du’aa is an act of worship and it is for Allah 5 alone there should be no doubt in the people’s minds that the Berailwis who make du’aa to humans or to the inhabitants of the graves are Kafirs outside the fold of AJ Islam.

If a people should enter a man’s kouse, then he the owner of the house is their Ameer until they depart; it’s incumbent on them to obey his orders.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by AdhDhahaabee, who said a liar was found in the chain of transmitters by the name of Mualla Ibn Hilaal.

This fabricated khabar doesn’t make sense because many times we visit the homes of weak Muslims and apostates to invite them back to Al Islam. How can an apostate be Ameer over the believers when Allah 2% said:

Sunan Abu Dawud (English trans.) Vol. 1. p. 387, No. 1474. 'S” Surah Al An‘aam 6:162.

“And never will Allah grant to the disbelievers a mastery over the believers.”"*

However if the person whose home you visit is a practising Muslim; then no one has the right to lead him in salah in his own home, unless he appoints someone else to do so. In this regard the Holy Prophet 2% said: “No man must lead another in prayer in his house i.e. in the house of the latter or where the latter has authority, or sit in his place of honour without his permission. Shu’bah said: I asked Ismail what is the meaning of his place of honour? He replied his throne. 7158

The Jumu’ah prayer is compulsory on fifty men and whenever they are less than fifty, Jumu’ah is not compulsory on them.

Related by At-Tabaraani and classified fabricated by AdhDhahaabee.

There is no specified number mentioned in the authentic traditions for the Jumu’ah prayer. Hence we are allowed to perform Jumu’ah even if we are only three.

In Europe, the Americas and the Caribbean, there are a lot of mosques where Jumu’ah prayers is performed and the

"S$ Surah An-Nisaa 4:14] ' Sunan Abu Dawud (English trans.) Vol. 1 p. 153, No. 582.

congregation doesn’t reach fifty devotees. If we should go by this fabricated khabar many people in various parts of the world would have to abandon their Jumu’ah prayers.
content_id:
Barangsiapa membaca (Al-Fatihah) saat salat di belakang imam, mulutnya akan dipenuhi api pada Hari Kiamat.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Tahir dalam kitabnya At-Tadzkirah dan ia juga mengklasifikasikannya sebagai palsu, menyatakan bahwa seorang pendusta ditemukan dalam rantai perawi.

Hadis palsu yang disebutkan di atas memberikan kesan bahwa haram bagi seseorang membaca Surah Al-Fatihah saat salat di belakang imam. Masalah ini adalah perselisihan di antara para ulama masa lalu dan masa kini. Mereka berbeda pendapat tentang kebolehan membaca Surah Al-Fatihah di belakang imam dengan tiga pendapat:

1. Wajib membaca Surah Al-Fatihah di semua salat ketika salat di belakang imam, baik dalam salat yang dibaca pelan maupun yang dibaca keras.

2. Wajib diam di semua salat, baik yang dibaca pelan maupun yang dibaca keras.

3. Ketika salat di belakang imam, hendaklah membaca Surah Al-Fatihah dalam diri sendiri pada salat yang dibaca pelan namun tidak pada salat yang dibaca keras karena kita semua harus mendengarkan bacaan imam dengan saksama.

Pendapat terakhir adalah yang paling tepat dan merupakan mazhab Imam Malik dan Ahmad ibn Hanbal.

Hadis Qudsi berikut menyatakan bahwa kita harus membaca Surah Al-Fatihah di belakang imam dalam diri kita pada salat yang dibaca pelan. Dari Abu Hurairah (ra) dari Nabi ﷺ yang berfirman bahwa Allah ﷻ berfirman: "Aku telah membagi salat antara Diri-Ku dan hamba-Ku menjadi dua bagian, dan hamba-Ku akan mendapatkan apa yang dimintanya." Maka apabila hamba mengucapkan "Alhamdulillahi Rabbil 'Alamin," Allah ﷻ berkata: "Hamba-Ku memuji-Ku."

Merupakan sunnah yang dianjurkan (Sunnah Muakkadah) untuk mandi bagi setiap salat Jumat.

Ini adalah hadis sahih yang autentik. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Mandi hari Jumat adalah wajib atas setiap Muslim yang baligh." Ini merupakan salah satu sunnah Jumat yang sangat dianjurkan.

Dianjurkan membaca Surah Al-Kahfi pada hari Jumat (ini adalah sunnah). Begitu pula hendaknya kita berusaha tiba di masjid sebelum imam naik ke mimbar agar mendapat berkah-berkah khusus dari Allah ﷻ. Meskipun salat Jumat tidak wajib bagi wanita, mereka hendaknya hadir sesering mungkin untuk meningkatkan keimanan. Jika seorang laki-laki meninggalkan tiga salat Jumat berturut-turut tanpa uzur, ia telah melakukan dosa besar dalam Islam. Salat Jumat tidak wajib atas musafir, orang sakit, dan orang yang dipenjara karena ia tidak bebas. Tidak ada masalah dalam menyampaikan khutbah dalam bahasa selain bahasa Arab karena tujuan khutbah adalah untuk memberi bimbingan kepada umat; maka bagaimana bisa memberi bimbingan kepada orang-orang jika khutbah tidak dalam bahasa yang mereka pahami.

Tidak ada seorang Nabi pun yang pernah mengalami mimpi basah karena sesungguhnya mimpi basah adalah dari setan.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Adiy dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Adz-Dzahabi.

Tidak akan ada Mahdi dan tidak ada Isa (yakni kembalinya Yesus).

Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Hakim 4/441 dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Asy-Syaukani dan Ash-Shaghani.

Khabar palsu ini bertentangan dengan Al-Quran dan Sunnah. Kedatangan Isa disebutkan dalam Al-Quran yang mulia serta dalam banyak tradisi autentik Nabi ﷺ. Oleh karena itu tidak pantas bagi seorang Muslim untuk mengingkari keimanan terhadapnya. Mengenai kembalinya Isa, Allah ﷻ berfirman bahwa Isa adalah tanda bagi datangnya Kiamat (Surah Az-Zukhruf: 61). Ibnu Katsir berkata bahwa...

Doa Yang Shalat adalah jaminan bagi salatnya jamaah.

Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Dawud, At-Tirmidzi, dan Ibnu Majah. Para ulama berbeda pendapat tentang keasliannya. Makna yang benar tentang tanggung jawab imam adalah bahwa imam bertanggung jawab atas kesempurnaan salat berjemaah dan hendaknya menjadi teladan dalam kesempurnaan bacaan dan kekhusyukan.
content_ar:
يتناول هذا الجزء مسألة القراءة خلف الإمام في الصلاة، وهي من المسائل التي اختلف فيها الفقهاء خلافاً واسعاً، مع التنبيه على حديث موضوع وُظِّف في هذا الباب.

الحديث الموضوع في القراءة خلف الإمام

وردت رواية تقول: "من قرأ خلف الإمام مُلئ فوه ناراً يوم القيامة"، وقد رواها ابن طاهر في كتابه التذكرة، وهي حديث موضوع لا يجوز الاستناد إليه في إثبات حكم شرعي. والوضّاعون كثيراً ما عمدوا إلى مسائل خلافية واختلقوا فيها أحاديث تُرجّح رأياً على رأي بغير حجة مشروعة.

حكم القراءة خلف الإمام

اختلف الفقهاء في حكم القراءة خلف الإمام على مذاهب:

  • المذهب الحنفي: لا تجوز القراءة خلف الإمام مطلقاً، لا الفاتحة ولا غيرها في الجهرية والسرية، استناداً إلى قوله تعالى: {وَإِذَا قُرِئَ الْقُرْآنُ فَاسْتَمِعُوا لَهُ وَأَنصِتُوا} [الأعراف: 204].
  • المذهب المالكي: تُستحب ترك القراءة في الجهرية، وتُستحب القراءة في السرية.
  • المذهب الشافعي: تجب قراءة الفاتحة على المأموم في كل ركعة.
  • المذهب الحنبلي: تسقط الفاتحة عن المأموم في الجهرية دون السرية.

الأدلة الصحيحة في المسألة

من أبرز الأدلة الصحيحة في هذا الباب:

  • قوله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "لا صلاة لمن لم يقرأ بفاتحة الكتاب"، متفق عليه. وقد استدل به الشافعية على وجوب قراءة الفاتحة على كل مصلٍّ.
  • قوله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "وإذا قرأ فأنصتوا"، رواه مسلم. وقد استدل به الحنفية والحنابلة على سقوط القراءة في الجهرية.

أثر الأحاديث الموضوعة في تأجيج الخلافات الفقهية

لجأ بعض المتعصبة لمذاهبهم إلى الأحاديث الموضوعة لنصرة آرائهم الفقهية، وهذا من أسوأ أنواع التعصب، لأنه يستخدم الكذب في الدين. والعالم الرباني هو من يُقبل الحق أينما كان ويُلزم نفسه بالدليل لا بالرأي المجرد.

الصلاة الخاشعة هي المقصود

ينبغي ألا يشغل المصلي نفسه بهذه الخلافات أثناء الصلاة على حساب الخشوع والحضور القلبي. فالله تعالى يريد من عباده أن يقفوا بين يديه بقلوب حاضرة، وأن تكون صلاتهم صلة حقيقية بينهم وبين ربهم. قال تعالى: {قَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ * الَّذِينَ هُمْ فِي صَلَاتِهِمْ خَاشِعُونَ} [المؤمنون: 1-2].
